response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work. While his experience aligns well with cloud and TypeScript/Python ecosystems, his AI-specific production experience is less explicitly detailed than the role requires, and his leadership in GenAI contexts is not clearly established.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Python-adjacent languages (DLang), and cloud-ready architectures.
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, showing direct relevance to GenAI.
Proven ability to lead technical projects, mentor teams, and drive engineering excellence across diverse domains.
concerns: AI/GenAI production experience is not explicitly quantified (e.g., 8+ years of AI-driven solutions), with more emphasis on general software development.
Lacks explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques in resume details.
Customer-facing technical leadership in GenAI contexts is not clearly demonstrated, despite strong consulting and project management background.
